author: doll-agent
content: Add Polynomial::compose(&self, q) on the power basis. Horner-on-coefficients: starting from r = self.coeffs[deg], walk descending coefficients computing r = r * q + c. Returns r such that r(x) == self(q(x)). Domain/window must match. 5 tests cover identity composition, x^2 substitution, full eval-consistency, constant-p, and domain-mismatch. Power basis only — non-power bases follow-up.
